title: Dragon Egg Permadeath
description: When a player is killed by another player holding the dragon egg in their offhand, the death is permanent! This makes the dragon egg more than just a trophy, and less likely to just sit in an enderchest for a whole SMP.
body:
Dragon Egg Permadeath is a plugin that makes it so that when a player kills another player while holding the dragon egg in their offhand, the death is permanent and they are banned from the server. The plugin announces the death, and strikes the victim with lightning to signal the death.

This plugin makes the dragon egg more valuable than just a trophy, and less likely to sit in a enderchest or underground vault 3 million blocks from spawn.
